title: Brendan Carr says his broadcast license threat wasn’t really about Iran war coverage
summary: FCC Chair Brendan Carr clarified that his controversial statement about broadcast licenses wasn't targeting Iran war coverage, but rather was responding to what he called misleading headlines. The clarification attempts to address criticism that the FCC was threatening to revoke licenses over news coverage.
content:
Federal Communications Commission Chair Brendan Carr never meant to threaten broadcast licenses over their coverage of the war in Iran, he told reporters after an event hosted by FGS and Semafor.
"My comments weren't actually on the Iran war," Carr said in response to a question from The Verge about his statement regarding coverage of the war. "I understand why people say that. I made a statement quoting a tweet."
On March 14th, Carr quote-tweeted a screenshot of a Truth Social post from President Donald Trump, who had bemoaned "an intentionally misleading headline" related to the US military action in the Middle East. "Broadcasters that a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 布伦丹·卡尔表示他的广播执照威胁与伊朗战争报道无关
zh.summary: 美国联邦通信委员会主席布伦丹·卡尔澄清，他关于广播执照的有争议声明并非针对伊朗战争报道，而是对他所称的误导性标题的回应。这一澄清试图解决人们对美国联邦通信委员会威胁吊销新闻报道执照的批评。

fr.title: Brendan Carr dit que sa menace de permis de radiodiffusion n'était pas vraiment à propos de la couverture de la guerre en Iran
fr.summary: Le président de la FCC Brendan Carr a précisé que sa déclaration controversée sur les licences de radiodiffusion ne visait pas la couverture de la guerre en Iran, mais était plutôt une réponse à ce qu'il appelait des titres trompeurs. Cette clarification tente de répondre aux critiques selon lesquelles la FCC menaçait de révoquer les licences en raison de la couverture de l'actualité.

de.title: Brendan Carr sagt, dass seine Rundfunksendedrohung nicht wirklich um die Berichterstattung über den Krieg im Iran ging
de.summary: FCC-Vorsitzender Brendan Carr klärte auf, dass seine umstrittene Aussage zu Rundfunklizenzen nicht auf die Berichterstattung über den Krieg im Iran abzielte, sondern eher eine Antwort auf das war, was er als irreführende Schlagzeilen bezeichnete. Die Klarstellung versucht, Kritik zu adressieren, dass die FCC mit der Bedrohung, Lizenzen wegen Nachrichtenberichterstattung zu widerrufen.

es.title: Brendan Carr dice que su amenaza de licencia de radiodifusión no era realmente sobre la cobertura de la guerra de Irán
es.summary: El presidente de la FCC Brendan Carr aclaró que su controvertida declaración sobre licencias de radiodifusión no estaba dirigida a la cobertura de la guerra de Irán, sino que fue una respuesta a lo que él llamó titulares engañosos. La aclaración intenta abordar las críticas de que la FCC estaba amenazando con revocar licencias por cobertura de noticias.

title: You can now transfer your chats and personal information from other chatbots directly into Gemini
summary: Google is launching switching tools that let users migrate their chat histories and personal data from competing AI chatbots to Gemini. The feature aims to reduce friction for users switching AI services and reflects intensifying competition in the AI chatbot market.
content: Google is launching "switching tools" that, just as it sounds, will make it easier for users of other chatbots to switch to Gemini.

zh.title: 你现在可以直接将你的聊天和个人信息从其他聊天机器人转移到Gemini
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了切换工具，让用户将聊天历史记录和个人数据从竞争对手的AI聊天机器人迁移到Gemini。该功能旨在减少用户切换AI服务的摩擦，反映了AI聊天机器人市场日益激烈的竞争。

fr.title: Vous pouvez maintenant transférer vos conversations et informations personnelles d'autres chatbots directement à Gemini
fr.summary: Google lance des outils de commutation qui permettent aux utilisateurs de migrer leurs historiques de conversation et leurs données personnelles depuis des chatbots d'IA concurrents vers Gemini. Cette fonctionnalité vise à réduire les frictions pour les utilisateurs qui changent de services d'IA et reflète la concurrence croissante sur le marché des chatbots d'IA.

de.title: Sie können Ihre Chats und persönlichen Informationen von anderen Chatbots jetzt direkt zu Gemini übertragen
de.summary: Google startet Umschalt-Tools, mit denen Benutzer ihre Chat-Verläufe und persönliche Daten von konkurrierenden KI-Chatbots zu Gemini migrieren können. Die Funktion soll die Reibung für Benutzer reduzieren, die KI-Services wechseln, und spiegelt intensiveren Wettbewerb auf dem KI-Chatbot-Markt wider.

es.title: Ahora puede transferir sus chats e información personal de otros chatbots directamente a Gemini
es.summary: Google está lanzando herramientas de cambio que permiten a los usuarios migrar su historial de chats y datos personales de chatbots de IA competidores a Gemini. La función tiene como objetivo reducir la fricción para los usuarios que cambian de servicios de IA y refleja una competencia cada vez más intensa en el mercado de chatbots de IA.

title: David Sacks is no longer the White House AI and Crypto Czar
summary: David Sacks, the prominent venture capitalist serving as Trump's Special Advisor on AI and Crypto, has stepped down from his government role as a special government employee. His departure raises questions about his tenure, as SGE status was limited to 130 days but he had served for over a year.
content:
David Sacks, the venture capitalist and tech billionaire who'd become Silicon Valley's primary advocate inside the White House and a key architect of its aggressive AI policy initiatives, revealed on Thursday that he was no longer a special government employee - and therefore no longer President Donald Trump's Special Advisor on AI and Crypto.
Sacks' official status as an SGE allowed him to work simultaneously in the private sector and for the government, but for no more than 130 days, raising questions about why he was still in the job more than a year after his appointment. But in an interview with Bloomberg Television discussing the White  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 大卫·萨克斯不再担任白宫人工智能和加密货币沙皇
zh.summary: 著名风险投资家、担任特朗普人工智能和加密货币特别顾问的大卫·萨克斯已从其特殊政府雇员的政府职位上辞职。他的离职引发了对其任期的质疑,因为特殊政府雇员身份仅限于130天,但他已服职超过一年。

fr.title: David Sacks n'est plus le Tsar de l'IA et de la Crypto de la Maison Blanche
fr.summary: David Sacks, un éminent capitaliste-risqueur servant de conseiller spécial de Trump en matière d'IA et de crypto-monnaie, a démissionné de son rôle gouvernemental en tant qu'employé gouvernemental spécial. Son départ soulève des questions sur son mandat, car le statut SGE était limité à 130 jours, mais il avait servi pendant plus d'un an.

de.title: David Sacks ist nicht mehr der White House AI und Crypto Czar
de.summary: David Sacks, ein prominenter Risikokapitalist und Sonderberater von Trump für künstliche Intelligenz und Kryptowährungen, ist von seinem Regierungsamt als besonderer Regierungsangestellter zurückgetreten. Sein Ausscheiden wirft Fragen über seine Amtszeit auf, da der SGE-Status auf 130 Tage begrenzt war, er aber über ein Jahr lang tätig war.

es.title: David Sacks ya no es el Zar de la IA y Criptomonedas de la Casa Blanca
es.summary: David Sacks, un destacado capitalista de riesgo que se desempeña como Asesor Especial de Trump en IA y Criptomonedas, se ha retirado de su cargo gubernamental como empleado gubernamental especial. Su salida plantea preguntas sobre su mandato, ya que el estado de SGE estaba limitado a 130 días, pero había servido durante más de un año.

A good robovac can save you a surprising amount of time. Luckily, Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is a great time to pick one up, as you can currently find deals on everything from basic, budget-friendly robovacs to high-end models that can mop or pick up objects. Whether you’re looking for a completely hands-free experience or just a little help keeping your floors clean, there are plenty of great options on sale right now, some of which have even dropped to their best price to date.
To make finding the right vacuum a little easier, we’ve rounded up the best deals from brands like Eufy and Roborock below, as well as excellent alternatives from Narwal, Dreame, and Ecovacs. And if you’re curious what else is on sale, our larger roundup for the best deals from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale has you covered with discounts on earbuds, smart lighting, and plenty of other Verge-approved tech.

zh.summary: 亚马逊大春季促销以Roborock、Dreame和Eufy扫地机器人的大幅折扣为特色,部分型号达到历史最低价。推荐选项包括具有拖地功能、障碍物规避和强吸力的高级型号。

Las opciones destacadas incluyen modelos avanzados con capacidades de fregado, evitación de obstáculos y potente succión.

title: Apple’s Mac Pro is dead, apparently for good this time
summary: Apple has discontinued the 'cheese grater' Mac Pro workstation that had been in production since 2006, with the M2 Ultra edition being the last model. The discontinuation reflects Apple's shift away from professional expansion capabilities toward fully integrated, non-expandable system design.
content:
The most expensive Mac you could get is no longer available on Apple's website, as 9to5Mac reports that the "cheese grater" Mac Pro workstation has been discontinued. It had been a part of the lineup since replacing the Power Mac G5 in 2006 when Apple shifted from Arm to Intel processors, but it's had the feeling of a vestigial limb ever since Apple dropped Intel for its own M-series chips. 
The M2 Ultra edition of the Mac Pro launched three years ago, with Apple hardware exec and possible future CEO John Ternus saying that "for those users who need the versatility of internal expansion, Mac Pro combines PCIe slots with our most powerful ch …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果Mac Pro已死,这一次似乎是永久的了
zh.summary: 苹果已停产自2006年以来一直在生产的"芝士刨丝器"Mac Pro工作站,M2 Ultra版本是最后一款型号。这一停产反映了苹果从专业扩展功能转向完全集成、不可扩展系统设计的转变。

fr.title: Le Mac Pro d'Apple est mort, apparemment pour de bon cette fois
fr.summary: Apple a arrêté la production de la station de travail Mac Pro 'râpe à fromage' qui était en production depuis 2006, l'édition M2 Ultra étant le dernier modèle. L'arrêt de la production reflète le passage d'Apple des capacités d'extension professionnelle vers une conception de système entièrement intégrée et non extensible.

de.title: Apples Mac Pro ist tot, diesmal anscheinend für immer
de.summary: Apple hat die 'Käsereibe' Mac Pro Workstation eingestellt, die seit 2006 in Produktion war, wobei die M2 Ultra Edition das letzte Modell ist. Die Einstellung spiegelt Apples Wechsel von professionellen Erweiterungsfunktionen zu einem vollständig integrierten, nicht erweiterbaren Systemdesign wider.

es.title: El Mac Pro de Apple ha muerto, aparentemente para siempre esta vez

La descontinuación refleja el cambio de Apple alejándose de las capacidades de expansión profesional hacia un diseño de sistema completamente integrado e inexpandible.

title: Elon Musk loses big in court; X boycott perfectly legal
summary: A judge dismissed Elon Musk's lawsuit against advertisers who boycotted X, ruling that the boycott is legally protected activity. The court admonished the case as a 'fishing expedition,' dealing a significant legal defeat to Musk's efforts to prevent advertiser-led protests.
content: X admonished for "fishing expedition" as judge dismisses ad boycott lawsuit.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克在法庭上大败诉；X 抵制完全合法
zh.summary: 一名法官驳回了埃隆·马斯克针对抵制 X 的广告商的诉讼，裁定该抵制是受法律保护的活动。法院指责该案为"钓鱼式诉讼"，这对马斯克防止广告商主导的抗议活动的努力造成了重大法律挫折。

fr.title: Elon Musk perd gros devant la cour ; le boycott de X est parfaitement légal
fr.summary: Un juge a rejeté le procès d'Elon Musk contre les annonceurs qui ont boycotté X, jugeant que le boycott est une activité légalement protégée. La cour a qualifié l'affaire de « pêche à la ligne », infligeant une défaite juridique majeure aux efforts de Musk pour prévenir les protestations menées par les annonceurs.

de.title: Elon Musk verliert groß vor Gericht; X-Boykott ist vollkommen legal
de.summary: Ein Richter wies Elon Musks Klage gegen Werbetreibende, die X boykottierten, ab und befand, dass der Boykott eine rechtlich geschützte Aktivität ist. Das Gericht bezeichnete den Fall als „Angelexpedition", was einen erheblichen rechtlichen Rückschlag für Musks Bemühungen darstellt, werbegeführte Proteste zu verhindern.

es.title: Elon Musk pierde una gran batalla en los tribunales; el boicot de X es perfectamente legal
es.summary: Un juez desestimó la demanda de Elon Musk contra los anunciantes que boicoteaban X, determinando que el boicot es una actividad protegida legalmente. El tribunal calificó el caso como una "expedición de pesca", infligiendo una derrota legal significativa a los esfuerzos de Musk para prevenir protestas lideradas por anunciantes.

title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
summary: Wikipedia has implemented stricter policies to limit AI-generated content in articles as the platform addresses concerns about accuracy and editorial standards. The policy shift reflects ongoing tensions between AI adoption and the need for human oversight in knowledge curation.
content: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

zh.title: 维基百科严厉打击人工智能在文章写作中的使用
zh.summary: 维基百科实施了更严格的政策，以限制文章中的人工智能生成的内容，解决平台对准确性和编辑标准的担忧。这一政策转变反映了人工智能采用与知识整理中人类监督必要性之间持续存在的紧张关系。

fr.title: Wikipédia réprime l'utilisation de l'IA dans la rédaction d'articles
fr.summary: Wikipédia a mis en œuvre des politiques plus strictes pour limiter le contenu généré par l'IA dans les articles, car la plate-forme aborde les préoccupations concernant la précision et les normes éditoriales. Le changement de politique reflète les tensions continues entre l'adoption de l'IA et le besoin de surveillance humaine dans la curation des connaissances.

de.title: Wikipedia geht streng gegen die Nutzung von KI beim Schreiben von Artikeln vor
de.summary: Wikipedia hat strengere Richtlinien implementiert, um von KI generierte Inhalte in Artikeln zu begrenzen, da die Plattform Bedenken hinsichtlich Genauigkeit und redaktioneller Standards berücksichtigt. Diese Richtlinienänderung spiegelt anhaltende Spannungen zwischen der KI-Einführung und dem Bedarf an menschlicher Aufsicht bei der Wissensverwaltung wider.

es.title: Wikipedia intensifica la represión del uso de la IA en la redacción de artículos
es.summary: Wikipedia ha implementado políticas más estrictas para limitar el contenido generado por IA en artículos, abordando las preocupaciones de la plataforma sobre exactitud y estándares editoriales. El cambio de política refleja las tensiones continuas entre la adopción de IA y la necesidad de supervisión humana en la curación del conocimiento.

title: Google is making it easier to import another AI’s memory into Gemini
summary: Google Gemini introduced 'Import Memory' and 'Import Chat History' features that help users transfer preferences and chat data from other AI chatbots. The features work by copying prompts between systems to sync user preferences or uploading entire chat exports, reflecting competition to reduce switching costs.
content:
After Anthropic updated its tool for copying another AI's memory into Claude earlier this month, Google Gemini is rolling out new "Import Memory" and "Import Chat History" features on desktop that can help users quickly copy over everything their current AI already knows about them.  To use the "Import Memory" tool, users copy and paste a suggested prompt from Gemini into their previous AI, then paste the output from the previous AI into Gemini, which should get Gemini caught up on their preferences. 
The "Import Chat History" feature has users request an export of all of their chats from their previous AI, which they upload to Gemini in th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌使将其他AI的记忆导入Gemini变得更容易
zh.summary: 谷歌Gemini推出了"导入记忆"和"导入聊天历史"功能，帮助用户从其他AI聊天机器人传输偏好和聊天数据。这些功能通过在系统之间复制提示来同步用户偏好，或上传整个聊天导出文件，反映了降低用户转换成本的竞争趋势。

fr.title: Google facilite l'importation de la mémoire d'une autre IA dans Gemini
fr.summary: Google Gemini a introduit les fonctionnalités « Importer la mémoire » et « Importer l'historique des discussions » qui aident les utilisateurs à transférer les préférences et les données de discussion d'autres chatbots IA. Les fonctionnalités fonctionnent en copiant les invites entre les systèmes pour synchroniser les préférences de l'utilisateur ou en téléchargeant des exportations de discussion complètes, reflétant la concurrence pour réduire les coûts de changement de plateforme.

de.title: Google macht es einfacher, den Speicher einer anderen KI in Gemini zu importieren
de.summary: Google Gemini führte die Funktionen "Speicher importieren" und "Chatverlauf importieren" ein, die Benutzer bei der Übertragung von Voreinstellungen und Chatdaten von anderen KI-Chatbots unterstützen. Die Funktionen funktionieren, indem Eingabeaufforderungen zwischen Systemen kopiert werden, um Benutzereinstellungen zu synchronisieren, oder indem gesamte Chat-Exporte hochgeladen werden, was den Wettbewerb widerspiegelt, um die Wechselkosten zu senken.

es.title: Google facilita la importación de la memoria de otra IA en Gemini
es.summary: Google Gemini presentó las funciones "Importar memoria" e "Importar historial de chat" que ayudan a los usuarios a transferir preferencias y datos de chat de otros chatbots de IA. Las funciones funcionan copiando indicaciones entre sistemas para sincronizar las preferencias del usuario o cargando exportaciones de chat completas, reflejando la competencia para reducir los costos de cambio de plataforma.

title: Apple will reportedly allow other AI chatbots to plug into Siri
summary: Apple's upcoming iOS 27 update will allow users to select which third-party AI chatbot integrates with Siri, including options from Google, Anthropic, and others alongside the current OpenAI integration. The new 'Extensions' system opens Siri to multi-vendor competition and gives users control over their AI assistant experience.
content:
Siri currently has an integration with OpenAI’s ChatGPT. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

Apple's iOS 27 update will allow users to choose the AI chatbot they want to link with Siri. That's according to a report from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, who says third-party chatbots downloaded from the App Store, like Google's Gemini or Anthropic's Claude, will be able to fetch replies for Siri - similar to how the voice assistant already works with OpenAI's ChatGPT.
The new system, reportedly called "Extensions," will give users the ability to enable or disable the chatbots they want to connect with Siri on the iPhone, iPad, and Mac, Bloomberg reports. The upcoming integrations will also work with the standalone app Apple reportedly plans  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple 据报将允许其他 AI 聊天机器人接入 Siri
zh.summary: 即将推出的 iOS 27 更新将允许用户选择哪个第三方 AI 聊天机器人与 Siri 集成，包括来自谷歌、Anthropic 等的选项，以及当前的 OpenAI 集成。新的"扩展"系统向多个供应商开放 Siri，让用户能够控制他们的 AI 助手体验。

fr.title: Apple permettrait à d'autres chatbots d'IA de se connecter à Siri
fr.summary: La prochaine mise à jour iOS 27 d'Apple permettra aux utilisateurs de choisir quel chatbot d'IA tiers s'intègre à Siri, y compris des options de Google, Anthropic et d'autres aux côtés de l'intégration OpenAI actuelle. Le nouveau système « Extensions » ouvre Siri à la concurrence multi-fournisseurs et donne aux utilisateurs le contrôle de leur expérience d'assistant IA.

de.title: Apple wird Berichten zufolge anderen KI-Chatbots die Verbindung zu Siri ermöglichen
de.summary: Das kommende iOS 27 Update von Apple wird Benutzern ermöglichen, auszuwählen, welcher KI-Chatbot eines Drittanbieters sich in Siri integriert, einschließlich Optionen von Google, Anthropic und anderen neben der aktuellen OpenAI-Integration. Das neue 'Extensions'-System öffnet Siri für Multi-Vendor-Wettbewerb und gibt Benutzern die Kontrolle über ihr KI-Assistenten-Erlebnis.

es.title: Apple permitirá que otros chatbots de IA se conecten a Siri
es.summary: La próxima actualización de iOS 27 de Apple permitirá a los usuarios seleccionar qué chatbot de IA de terceros se integra con Siri, incluidas opciones de Google, Anthropic y otros junto a la integración actual de OpenAI. El nuevo sistema de "Extensiones" abre Siri a la competencia entre múltiples proveedores y da a los usuarios el control sobre su experiencia con el asistente de IA.

title: Spotify seeks $300M from Anna's Archive, which ignores all court proceedings
summary: Spotify is pursuing a $300 million lawsuit against Anna's Archive, a shadow library distributing pirated content, but the service has consistently ignored court orders. The case highlights ongoing challenges in enforcing digital piracy laws against decentralized platforms that evade legal jurisdiction.
content: Even with court orders, music firms struggle to eliminate notorious shadow library.

zh.title: Spotify 向 Anna's Archive 索赔 3 亿美元，该平台无视所有法庭诉讼
zh.summary: Spotify 正在对 Anna's Archive（一个分发盗版内容的影子图书馆）进行 3 亿美元的诉讼，但该服务一直无视法庭命令。该案例突出了在执行针对规避法律管辖权的去中心化平台的数字盗版法律方面的持续挑战。

fr.title: Spotify réclame 300 millions de dollars à Anna's Archive, qui ignore toutes les procédures judiciaires
fr.summary: Spotify poursuit une action en justice de 300 millions de dollars contre Anna's Archive, une bibliothèque fantôme distribuant du contenu piraté, mais le service a systématiquement ignoré les ordonnances judiciaires. Cette affaire souligne les défis permanents dans l'application des lois sur le piratage numérique contre les plateformes décentralisées qui contournent la juridiction légale.

de.title: Spotify fordert 300 Millionen Dollar von Anna's Archive, die alle Gerichtsverfahren ignoriert
de.summary: Spotify verfolgt eine 300-Millionen-Dollar-Klage gegen Anna's Archive, eine Schattenbibliothek, die Raubkopien verbreitet, aber der Dienst hat Gerichtsbefehle konsequent ignoriert. title: Anker’s wireless charging pad offers Qi2 speeds for $15
summary: Anker's MagGo 15W Qi2 wireless charging pad is on sale for $14.99 as part of Amazon's Big Spring Sale, offering an affordable charging option for MagSafe-compatible phones. The pad supports devices and earbuds through a five-foot USB-C cable, though a wall adapter must be purchased separately.
content:
The MagGo wireless charging pad is available in black (shown here) or white. | Image: Anker	

I’ve probably saved minutes of my life by using a wireless charging puck. Minutes! More valuable than that, I’ve saved myself from bending over numerous times to pick up my USB-C cable that somehow always ends up on the floor. Those with magnet-equipped phones (like the iPhone 12 or newer, or a Google Pixel 10 or 10 Pro phone) can reap similar benefits from a MagSafe-ready Qi2 charging puck. Anker’s MagGo 15W pad is one such model, and it’s down to $14.99 ($15 off) at Amazon and Walmart thanks to Amazon’s Big Spring Sale.
Is 15W fast enough to quickly recharge your phone? If you define “quickly” as under an hour, then no. If you need a bunch of juice in just a few minutes, plugging in is your best bet. But is 15W perfect for leaving your phone to recharge overnight? Yes, indeed.
Anker Qi2 15W wireless charging pad
Anker’s low-cost charging pad has a five-foot USB-C cable, and the company claims you can leave your phone’s case on while you charge. It doesn’t include a wall adapter.

Where to Buy:

 $29.99 $14.99 at Amazon (black)
 $29.99 $14.99 at Amazon (white)

The MagGo Qi2 puck doesn’t include a wall adapter, although one is required for use (Anker recommends a 25W adapter that supports Power Delivery). Assuming you already have one of those, it’s a nice accessory that makes it even easier than it already was to charge not just your phone, but your AirPods, too. Anker’s product page mentions support for Samsung’s Galaxy Buds, so it’s likely that other earbud models that have wireless charging-ready cases will work with this charging pad, too.

title: Streaming keeps getting more expensive: all the latest price hikes
summary: Streaming services industry-wide are raising prices in response to cable cord-cutting and rising content costs, with Netflix, Disney+, Prime Video, HBO Max and others all increasing fees and introducing ad-supported options.
content:
There’s more good stuff to watch than ever — if you can afford it. | Image: Amazon	

Death. Taxes. All your streaming services getting a little more expensive all the time. These are the new certainties in life, it seems.
Netflix has raised the cost of its subscription repeatedly in recent years. Disney Plus, Prime Video, HBO Max, Paramount Plus, Peacock — practically any service you can name — charges more per month than it did a few years ago, and many of them have introduced ad breaks. As customers cancel cable more quickly than anyone expected, the studios and distributors are looking for a way to make up the lost revenue. Good shows, live sports, and movies are more in demand — and thus more expensive — than ever. 
And after a decade of spending money like it was going out of style because all investors cared about were subscriber numbers, companies are looking for any way they can to improve their bottom line. They’re cracking down on password sharing, canceling shows for the tax breaks, and even selling prized content to other platforms. But the most common strategy is simply to charge you, the viewer, more. 
We’re tracking all the price increases and other changes from streaming services so you can make sure you’re only paying for what you want. (We’ll also include discounts and deals, though those seem to happen less and less.) Here’s the latest:

title: My brief, weird time with the Samsung TriFold
summary: A reviewer received a counterfeit Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold with a Chinese serial number instead of the promised Taiwan version, and Samsung discontinued the device shortly after. The experience highlights challenges around foldable phone availability and authenticity.
content:
We hardly knew ye.	

I was ready to give up on the Galaxy Z TriFold.
We had a strong case for getting a refund from the eBay seller - they'd claimed it was the version sold in Taiwan, but the phone that arrived at my door came with a Chinese serial number. That meant no Google services and lots of unfamiliar apps all requesting sensitive permissions. It was weird. Better off just sending this one back and trying again to acquire the US version, I thought. Then Samsung discontinued it.
Suddenly, the TriFold on my desk wasn't just a funny thing that happened on the way to getting a real TriFold. It was the only TriFold I was likely to get my hands on, probably e …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Govee’s color-changing smart lamps are on sale for up to 30 percent off
summary: Govee's color-changing smart lamps are discounted during Amazon's Big Spring Sale, with the Table Lamp 2 Pro at $134.99 and the basic Table Lamp 2 at $55.99. Both lamps support smart home integration via Matter and offer millions of color combinations.
content:
Govee’s good-sounding speaker / smart lamp hybrid can brighten your space with millions of colors. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Speaking from experience, better lighting can completely change how a space feels. Over the years, I’ve filled my apartment with Govee’s color-changing lights, and they’ve made it feel calmer and more cheerful. That’s why it’s worth noting that a couple of its table lamps are on sale as part of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, including the Table Lamp 2 Pro, which has returned to its all-time low of $134.99 ($45 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Govee’s storefront. The more basic, bedside-friendly Table Lamp 2 is also available from Amazon, Best Buy, and Govee for $55.99 ($24 off), nearly matching its lowest price to date.

Both RGB-equipped smart lamps can fill your space with millions of colors, and you can adjust both their brightness and warmth. They also come loaded with a slew of preset “scenes,” including sunset hues and holiday-inspired lighting themes, or you can create your own color combinations and effects using Govee’s app. The cheaper Table Lamp 2 offers over 60 preset scenes, while the pricier Table Lamp 2 Pro boasts more than 100, along with 210 individually controllable LED beads for smoother color blending. Both lamps can also sync with your music and support Matter, so you can connect either to Alexa, Google Home, or any major smart home platform for voice control.
The main difference is that the Table Lamp 2 Pro doubles as a portable Bluetooth speaker, so it can actually play music rather than just respond to it (though it’s not weatherproof, so be careful when it rains). title: Everyone hates Ticketmaster. Why’d Trump go easy on them?
summary: The Trump administration's Department of Justice has settled its antitrust case against Live Nation/Ticketmaster, while multiple states continue the fight. The settlement raises questions about the administration's antitrust enforcement approach despite widespread public opposition.
content:
Today on Decoder, we’re talking about the major antitrust lawsuit against Live Nation, and what it might mean for antitrust and competition law in general now that the Justice Department under Trump has decided to settle its part of the case. That’s even as many states — including New York, California, and Texas — carry on the fight. 
To break it all down, I’m joined by Verge senior policy reporter Lauren Feiner. Lauren is our resident court expert, by which I mean she’s been in the courtroom herself and chronicling this trial from the beginning.
You might be unfamiliar with the name Live Nation, but you’ve almost certainly encountered one of its many, many subsidiaries — the most infamous of these is called Ticketmaster. Longtime Decoder listeners might recall an episode we did on Ticketmaster back in 2023, in the wake of the Taylor Swift Eras Tour fiasco. That was when Ticketmaster’s website crashed during the first major rush for Eras Tour tickets. It was such a scandal, and Swifties are so politically powerful, that Live Nation was then dragged in front of Congress after widespread backlash spilled over into the mainstream. 



Verge subscribers, don’t forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Decoder wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here. 
In 2024, the Department of Justice launched an antitrust lawsuit against the company, seeking to break it up — to split Ticketmaster off from Live Nation to try and combat predatory practices and increasing ticket fees.
This seemed like a real slam dunk case against Live Nation, regardless of political affiliation — nobody likes Ticketmaster, and breaking up the company would score political points for whoever finally pulled the trigger. It was also supposed to be a sign of strong bipartisan antitrust support. 
The lawsuit was filed under the Biden administration. So even though Trump has since replaced Biden’s antitrust leaders, there was good reason to believe the new people in c

content:
Wikipedia will no longer allow editors to write or rewrite articles using AI. The update, which was added to Wikipedia's guidelines late last week, cites the tendency for AI-written articles to violate "several of Wikipedia's core content policies" as the reason for the ban.
The change applies to the English version of Wikipedia and will still allow editors to use AI in certain scenarios. That includes using large language models to "suggest basic copyedits" to their writing, but only if it "does not introduce content of its own." DJI's Avata 360 finds the company at an odd time. summary: Intel and LG Display's laptop screen technology has achieved record battery efficiency, with a Dell XPS 16 equipped with the Panther Lake chip lasting nearly 27 hours of web browsing on a 70Wh battery and drawing as little as 1.5 watts at idle.
content:
One of the coolest laptops we saw at CES in January was the new Dell XPS 16, with a unique 1-120Hz variable refresh rate display that can sip power when you don't need the screen to stay speedy. 
Just how little power might it consume? Notebookcheck has tested a version of the laptop with that LG Display screen and a new Intel Panther Lake chip - and it appears to be the most efficient laptop that's ever gone through its Wi-Fi web browsing test. At idle, the Core Ultra 325 laptop drew as little as 1.5 watts, and lasted nearly 27 hours of web browsing despite only housing a 70 watt-hour pack. That's well shy of the 99.5Wh Dell has sometimes  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
